calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Continued To Oct-21-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on the Petition to Approve the Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John Hughes, Esq. appeared for petitioner Daniel F. Dean, Administrator of the Estate of William Dean.
Order granting waiver of petitioner's presence at this morning's hearing was filed on July 30, 2008.
The minor, Michael Dean, and his mother, Rene Dean, were also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $458,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $81,381.15.
Costs - $214,288.54.

A net balance of $162,330.31 shall be deposited into a blocked account established for the Estate of Michael Dean in the Placer County Superior Court Guardianship proceedings, Case No. 4167.
The Court further Orders that $500.00 recovered as sanctions in a discovery matter from U.S. Ship Management, Inc. for attorney fees be disbursed to the Law Offices of John J. Hughes.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
